texto: Greatness lies not in high or outstanding ability. It lies simply in the willingness to use what we have for others. The greater the `other people` dimension, the greater our personal `greatness`.
explicacao: Citação de Chairman Mao sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Greatness lies not in high or outstanding ability. It lies simply in the willingness to use what …” articula reflexao, greatness, greater em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
